verses.text: Tua lai panin ama pian'na khua Nazareth-ah Jesuh pai a, a nungzuite in a zui uh hi

A Sabbath ni ciangin kikhopna inn-ah thu a hilh hi. Ama thuhilh a za mi tampite in lamdangsa-in, “Hihpa in hih thute koi panin a ngah ahi hiam? Hihpa tungah a kipia pilna a bang pilna ahi hiam? Bangci-in na lamdang hici bawltheih ahi hiam
Amah khutsiampa hilel a, Mary' tapa hilo ahi hiam? James, Josef, Judas, leh Simon-te' u hilo ahi hiam? A nau numeite zong hih lai mah-a om hilo ahi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua hi a, amah sangzolo uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Kamsang khat pen, ama khua, ama behte, leh ama innsung longal-ah kizahtakin pahtawina a ngah hi,” a ci hi
Tua hi a, cina tawmkhatte tungah khut nga-in a damsak cih simloh, tua lai-ah na lamdang lian bawl theilo hi
Amaute in amah a uploh manin lamdang a sa mahmah hi. Tua ciangin tua kiima om khuaneute-ah thuhilhin a pai kawikawi hi.
Jesuh in sawmlenihte sam a, amaute tungah dawi hawlkhiatna ding vangliatna pia-in, amaute nih nihin a sawlkhia hi
Amaute kiangah, “Ciangkhut simloh, na khualzinna uhah bangmah keng kei un. An ahi a, ip ahi a, sum ahi zongin keng kei un
Khedap bulh un la, ahi zongin puanak nih silhthuah kei un
A zin dingin a hong deih inn khat peuhpeuhah tung un la, tua khua panin na paikhiat mateng uh tua inn mahah om paisuak un

Na paina uh khua khatpeuh in note hong sangloin, na thuhilhna uh hong ngaihnop kei uh leh, tua khua nusia-in, na khe uha leivui bangte sin'san un. Tua pen amaute-a' dingin hilhkholhna ahi hi,” ci-in a vaikhak hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute kuankhia uh a, mite a mawhna panun a kisikna dingun thu a hilh uh hi
Dawi tampi hawlkhia uh a, cina mi tampi sathau zutin a damsak uh hi.
Kumpi Herod in Jesuh thu a kigengenna thu a za hi. Mi pawlkhat in, “Tuiphumpa Johan, sihna panin hingkik hi. Tua ahih manin hih vangliatnate nei hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahi zongin a dangte in, “Elijah hi,” ci uh a, pawlkhat leuleu in, “Tanglai-a kamsangte mah bangin kamsang khat hi,” a ci uh hi
Herod in Jesuh' nasepnate a zak ciangin, “A lutang ka tankhiat sak Johan hong hingkik hi,” a ci hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Herod in a nau Filip' zi Herodias a ten'pihna hangin Johan in Herod kiangah, “Na naupa' zi na ten'pih ding ngeina hilo hi,” ci-in gen zelzel ahih manin Herodias a heh suak a, galkapte in Johan manin thong sungah a khiatna dingin Herod a vaihawmsak hi
Tua ahih manin Herodias in Johan mudahin thatnuam a, ahi zongin that zolo hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Johan pen a thuman mihoih khat hi, ci-in Herod in ngaihsun ahih manin amah zahtakin siatna a thuakna ding panin hu hi. Ama thugente in a lungsim nuamlosak hi; ahi zongin a thugen zanuam veve hi
Ahi zongin a tawpna-ah Herodias in hunhoih ngah hi. Herod a suah ni hun a tun' ciangin kumpi uliante, galkapmangte, leh Galilee gamsunga om ulian khempeuh-a' dingin pawi a kham hi

Tua pawi bawlna sungah Herodias' tanu hong pai-in hong laam a, Herod leh a leenglate khempeuh lungdam mahmah uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in, “Bang deih na hiam; na deih peuhpeuh kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi
Amah in kamciam pia a, “Ka kumpi gam phelkhat ciangdong nangawnin, nong nget peuhpeuh kong piakna ding kong kiciam hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua numeino va paikhia-in a nu kiangah, “Bang ngen ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a va dong hi. A nu in, “Tuiphumpa Johan' lutang ngen in,” ci-in a dawng hi
Numeino zong kumpipa kiangah hong paikik pahin, “Kuangdai khat sungah Tuiphumpa Johan' lutang nong piakpah ding ka deih hi,” a va ci hi
Hih thu a zak ciangin kumpipa dah mahmah hi. Ahi zongin a kiciamnasa hang leh a leenglate' maitang a zahtakna hangin nial ngamlo hi
Tua ahih ciangin Johan' lutang a hong paipihna dingin galkapte khat a sawlpah hi. Amah zong pai-in thong sungah Johan' lutang tankhia a
kuangdai khat sungah a lutang hong paipihin numeino tungah a pia hi
Johan' nungzuite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin hong pai-in a luanghawm la uh a, hanah a vui uh hi.
Tua khit ciangin Jesuh kiangah sawltakte hong ciahkik uh a, a sepna khempeuh uh leh a thuhilhna khempeuh uh a zasak uh hi

Mi a ciah leh a kuan kiphamat uh ahih manin Jesuh leh a nungzuite in annekna ding hun nangawn nei manlo uh hi. Tua ahih manin Jesuh in, “Ei guak i om theihna ding mun khatah paikhia ni; tua lai-ah na tawlnga thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin gunkuang tuangin gamdaihna mun a zuan dingin a pai uh hi

Ahi zongin a paikhiatlam uh leh amaute ahihlam uh, mi tampi in thei uh ahih manin khuapi khempeuh panin a hong pai mite, lei lam tawnin na pai uh a, Jesuh leh a nungzuite a tun' ma-in a na ma tun' uh hi
Jesuh, tuigei a tun' ciangin mi tampi a na omkhin mu a, amaute, a cing omlo tuute tawh kibang sa ahih manin a khasiat mahmah hi. Tua hi a, amaute thu tampi tak a hilh hi
Nitak lam ciangin a nungzuite in Jesuh kiangah, “Tu-in nitak hita a, hih lai mun lah gamlak ahi hi
Hih kiima om khuate-ah amaute pai-in a annek ding uh a leina dingun hih mihonte sawlkhia in,” a ci uh hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Amaute' nekding bangkhat peuhpeuh pia un,” a ci hi. A nungzuite in, “Ngun peek za nih tawh anlum va lei-in amaute' nek dingin pia ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Anlum bangzah nei na hi uh hiam, va en dih un,” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Anlum nga leh ngasa tawn nih om hi,” ci-in a hong genkik uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Mihonte a pawl a pawlin khen un la, lopa hing tungah tusak un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih manin mihonte zong pawlkhatah za, pawlkhatah sawmnga, cih bangin a honhonin a gualtut uh hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in a anlum nga leh a ngasa tawn nihte la a, vantung lam ento-in Pasian tungah lungdamna a ko hi. A anlumte balnen a, mite tungah a piak dingin nungzuite a pia hi. Tua mah bangin ngasa tawn nihte zong amaute khempeuh a hawmsak hi
Amaute khempeuh in ne-in a kham uh hi
Tua ciangin nungzuite in a kikhamval anlum leh ngasa khawm uh a, paipel sawmlenih a dim hi
Tua an a ne mi sung panin pasal cingteng tul nga a pha hi.
Tua khit phetin Jesuh in a nungzuite gunkuangah tuangsakin, a galkhata om Bethsaida khua-ah mapaisak a, amah in mihonte a khua ciatah a ciah dingin a sawl hi
Amaute tawh a kikhen khit ciangin thungen dingin mualtungah a kahto hi
Khuamial ciangin tui laizang dong gunkuang tungta a, Jesuh ahih leh leitungah amah guakin omlai hi

Huih in a nungzuite lehmut ahih manin gunkuang hot zoloin haksa a sakna thu uh Jesuh in a thei hi. Tua hi a, zingsang lam nai thum pan nai guk kikal khawngin a nungzuite kiang lamah tuitung tawnin Jesuh a pai hi. Amaute a khengsuak ding bangin pai a
ahi zongin a nungzuite in tuitunga mi pai a muh ciangun, “Sikha hi,” ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin a awngkeek gawp uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a muh uh ciangin lau mahmah uh hi. Ahih hangin Jesuh in thakhatin amaute hopihpah a, “Lungnuamin om un. Keimah ka hi hi; lau kei un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute omna gunkuang tungah Jesuh kahto a, huihpi zong a daipah hi. Nungzuite in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh lungsim navaklo uh ahih manin anlum tawh kisai thupiang tel theilo uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Gennesaret gamah Jesuh in Cina Damsak

verses.text: Tui a kantan khit uh ciangin Gennesaret gam tung uh a, tuigei-ah a gunkuang uh a khih uh hi
Gunkuang panin a paikhiat khit phetun mite in Jesuh ahihlam a theipah uh hi
Tua gamsung tengah mite tai kawikawi uh a, Jesuh om hi, ci-in a kigenna mun peuhpeuhah cinate a lupna pheek uh tawh hong pua uh hi

Khuapi, khuaneu, leh khuakehtea a paina khempeuhah, mite in mihon kikhopna munah cinate hong pua uh a, a puanmongteep beek a lawn'sakna ding deihin Jesuh kiangah a thum uh hi. A puanmongteep a lawngkha mi khempeuh cidam pahpah uh hi.
